plugins.name: testability-review
plugins.description: Two-stage architectural-testability review: a style detector classifies each unit into a Style Classification Map, then an architecture reviewer applies a style-filtered antipattern catalog and reports findings with evidence and minimal remediations.

plugins.name: modularity-review
plugins.description: Single-stage modularity review: a reviewer scores coupling between pieces of code along two axes — Strength (how much they know about each other) and Distance (how far apart they sit) — and reports the tangled spots where both are high, with minimal seams to reduce Distance first, then Strength.

plugins.name: abstraction-review
plugins.description: Single-stage abstraction review: a reviewer examines the boundaries meant to hide a decision — interfaces, wrappers, service layers, adapters, facades — and flags abstractions that pass through without changing the language, leak internals to callers, sprawl across responsibilities, or impose ceremony on simple cases.
